# Gemini Lab

> Gemini Lab is an unofficial knowledge base for Google Gemini, Gemini API, and Google AI Studio.

## About

Gemini Lab provides comprehensive guides and tutorials for Google's Gemini AI models — from beginner to advanced — in Japanese and English. Topics include Gemini basics, API integration, Function Calling, multimodal features, Google AI Studio, and Gemini CLI.

## URL

- Website: https://gemilab.net
- Japanese: https://gemilab.net
- English: https://gemilab.net/en

## Contact

- Author: Masaki Hirokawa
- Website: https://dolice.design
